strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, exceeding the 15-year requirement with demonstrated technical depth
Leadership track record through multiple senior/staff roles, founding and maintaining GISCollective (active 7+ years), and creating educational content (workshops, conference talks)
Cloud and infrastructure experience with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and microservices at scale handling millions of requests per second
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products; only 2 months in current AI-focused role with no prior AI background or Master's/PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification)

Limited evidence of director-level strategic responsibilities—resume shows software craftsperson/educator focus rather than customer partnership advisory, product strategy definition, or large-scale organizational influence
Name discrepancy between resume header (Aisha Okonkwo) and all portfolio/contact information (Bogdan Szabo) raises verification concerns
response.justification: This candidate is a strong senior software engineer with 20 years of technical experience and solid architectural breadth, but fundamentally mismatches the role's core requirement: recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. The candidate's recent entry into AI infrastructure (April 2025, current role) is too nascent to constitute the "demonstrated products or platforms built with AI" called for in the job description. They lack the preferred Master's/PhD in AI, no AI-specific deliverables in their portfolio, and the resume demonstrates software craftsmanship and knowledge-sharing rather than AI strategy or director-level customer advisory and partnership work. Verification of the name discrepancy is also required.
